research_reference.notes: Research strategy was risk-on-only and flat otherwise. This package adapts it to Alpaca crypto spot by clipping shorts and generating long-only target weights. Backtest metrics from V26 research do not automatically apply to the long-only execution adapter.

risk_notes: Crypto is volatile and paper performance may not match live fills.
Alpaca crypto spot does not support short selling or margin; this artifact is long-only.
Run dry-run mode before enabling EXECUTE_PAPER_ORDERS=true.
